content: TASK-057 checkpoint done: ScreenFlow prototype map is now fit-centered instead of top-left, supports pointer drag pan, mouse wheel and +/-/Fit zoom controls, and separates branch labels near outgoing branches. Browser smoke on localhost:5173 confirmed centered transform, zoom transform change, drag transform change, and submit/back/redirect labels no longer share the same coordinate. TASK-056 performance remains open; next optimization target is layout/render recomputation and dense edge path costs.
